The fastest growing part of 8090 is our practice of ripping out legacy systems for large enterprises and migrating them to pristine, new, well documented and easy to maintain alternatives.

tweets.name: Hiten Shah
tweets.text:
The fastest way to get good at AI is to watch someone good use it.

Pair prompting makes that possible in public, or semi-public, channels where the work accumulates and others learn by following along.

This essay is my attempt to name the pattern and make it repeatable. https://t.co/rHst5RsrHb
